name: [GRIDHAND] Lead Capture Agent - Typeform complete → Pipedrive deal → assign to sales rep

gridhand.scenario: Typeform complete → Pipedrive deal → assign to sales rep
gridhand.description: When a potential customer completes a Typeform questionnaire on a small business's website, such as a real estate agency, GRIDHAND automatically triggers a workflow that creates a new deal in Pipedrive, filling in relevant details like customer name, contact information, and property preferences. This new deal is then instantly assigned to a designated sales representative, who receives a notification email with all the pertinent details, enabling them to swiftly follow up and convert the lead into a client within hours of the initial inquiry. By streamlining this process, the business owner can ensure that no potential sales opportunity slips through the cracks and that their team can respond promptly to capitalize on new leads.
